hooks.command: f=$(cat | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); case "$f" in *content.config.ts) echo "BLOCKED: $f is the Astro content-collection schema. Invoke the 'astro' skill (.claude/skills/astro/SKILL.md) before editing — per CLAUDE.md 'Project Skills — Auto-Trigger Rules'. Re-run after reading it." >&2; exit 2 ;; */site/*|site/*) echo "REMINDER: $f is under site/. CLAUDE.md requires the 'astro' skill for site/ work (.astro pages, content.config.ts, prepare-content.py, build errors, routing). Read .claude/skills/astro/SKILL.md if not already done this session." >&2; exit 1 ;; esac; exit 0
